description: A sales manager wants a report of sales volume by product for the US region for the last quarter.

nodes.task_description: Define the parameters for the report: date range (last quarter) and region (US).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sets the filters for the report.

nodes.task_description: Run the sales report generation tool.
The report is generated, showing total sales volume for each product sold in the US during the specified period, and is exported to Excel.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the correctly filtered and aggregated data in a downloadable format.
